framework.name: nist_ai_rmf
framework.description: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI 100-1). Voluntary US framework organized around four functions: Govern, Map, Measure, Manage.

controls.name: govern
controls.displayName: Govern — Cultivate a culture of risk management
controls.description: Policies, processes, accountability structures and culture related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks.

controls.name: map
controls.displayName: Map — Recognize context and identify risks
controls.description: Recognize the context in which the AI system operates and frame the risks related to that context.

controls.name: measure
controls.displayName: Measure — Assess risks identified in Map
controls.description: Analyze, assess, benchmark, and monitor AI risk and related impacts.

controls.name: manage
controls.description: Allocate risk resources to mapped and measured risks regularly. Risks should be prioritized, responded to, and managed.
